headline: Mary Trump Slams Uncle: 'The Trump Regime Is Weakening Us on Every Single Front'
summary: Recent moves by President Trump have sparked new commentary from a familiar critic.

headline: Tesla's Biggest Bull Frustrated With Elon Musk's Focus On DOGE Over Company: 'Patience Wearing Thin'
summary: Elon Musk is under fire from Tesla investors who are concerned about his lack of focus on the company.

headline: Trump's Tesla Shoutout Falls Flat — No Spike in Orders or Inventory Movement
summary: President Trump's publicity stunt for Tesla has not resulted in a sales uptick.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: DocuSign, Magnificent 7, Palantir — And Tariffs Keep Roiling Markets
Elon Musk's Tesla Halts Cybertruck Deliveries After Metal Panels Reportedly Fall Off — Owners Living In Cold Weather Say Glue Is Failing
summary: Tesla has halted Cybertruck deliveries amid reports that metal panels are falling off due to adhesive failures in cold weather.

headline: Apple Scrambles To Fix Siri's AI Failures After Public Misstep—Top Executive Admits Marketing It Too Soon Made Things Worse
summary: Apple is scrambling to fix delayed and underperforming AI-powered Siri features after prematurely marketing them, with a top executive admitting the situation is "ugly and embarrassing" and raising doubts about the company's ability to compete in the fast-moving AI race.

headline: Apple's iPhone 16e Outsells iPhone SE By 60%, But Analysts Say It Won't Stop China Sales From Sliding In 2025
summary: Apple's iPhone 16e is outselling the older iPhone SE by 60%, but analysts say the new budget model won't be enough to stop the company's projected sales decline in China this year.

headline: Apple Reportedly Fights UK Government's 'Unacceptable' Encryption Order Behind Closed Doors — No Press Or Public Allowed
summary: Apple reportedly challenged a secretive UK government order to weaken iCloud encryption in a closed-door hearing, sparking global privacy concerns and criticism from civil liberties groups.

headline: Canadian Grocers Boycott US Products As Tariffs, Trump's Annexation Remarks Worsen Tensions: 'American Booze Is Gone From The Shelves'
summary: Canadian retailers continue to take a stand against U.S. products, starting with non-essential items such as alcohol.
